named.h(3) Library Functions Manual named.h(3)

NAME

named.h - Named object registry for debugging — log identifiable resource names.

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define NAMED_REGISTER(ptr, name, type, fmt, parent_ptr)
Register any pointer with base name, type, format spec, and location (auto-suffix). #define NAMED_REGISTER_FMT(ptr, type, fmt_spec, fmt, ...)
Register with a formatted name, type, and format spec. #define NAMED_UNREGISTER(ptr)
Unregister a pointer. #define NAMED_GET(ptr)
Look up registered name for a pointer. #define NAMED_DESCRIBE(ptr, hint)
Describe a pointer in log format. #define NAMED_REGISTER_ID(id, name, type, fmt, parent_ptr)
Register an integer handle (fd, socket, etc.) with type. #define NAMED_UNREGISTER_ID(id)
Unregister an integer handle. #define NAMED_DESCRIBE_ID(id, hint)
Describe an integer handle in log format. #define NAMED_REGISTER_MUTEX(mutex, name, parent_ptr)
Register a mutex with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_RWLOCK(lock, name, parent_ptr)
Register an rwlock with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_COND(cond, name, parent_ptr)
Register a condition variable with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_SOCKET(socket, name, parent_ptr)
Register a socket with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_UNREGISTER_SOCKET(socket)
#define NAMED_REGISTER_WEBSOCKET(websocket, name, parent_ptr)
Register a WebSocket connection with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_DATACHANNEL(datachannel, name, parent_ptr)
Register a data channel with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_THREADPOOL_WORK(work, name, parent_ptr)
Register a thread pool work item with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_CLIENT(client, name, parent_ptr)
Register a client connection with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_CRYPTO_CONTEXT(ctx, name, parent_ptr)
Register a crypto context with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_TRANSPORT(transport, name, parent_ptr)
Register a transport with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_FRAME_BUFFER(buf, name, parent_ptr)
Register a frame buffer with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_PACKET_QUEUE(queue, name, parent_ptr)
Register a packet queue with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_AUDIO_RINGBUF(buf, name, parent_ptr)
Register an audio ring buffer with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_MIXER(mixer, name, parent_ptr)
Register an audio mixer with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_AUDIO_CODEC(codec, name, parent_ptr)
Register an audio codec with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_VIDEO_ENCODER(encoder, name, parent_ptr)
Register a video encoder with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_BUFFER_POOL(pool, name, parent_ptr)
Register a buffer pool with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_FFMPEG_DECODER(decoder, name, parent_ptr)
Register an FFmpeg decoder with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_FFMPEG_ENCODER(encoder, name, parent_ptr)
Register an FFmpeg encoder with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_H265_ENCODER(encoder, name, parent_ptr)
Register an H.265 encoder with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_H265_DECODER(decoder, name, parent_ptr)
Register an H.265 decoder with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_AUDIO_CONTEXT(ctx, name, parent_ptr)
Register an audio context with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_RATE_LIMITER(limiter, name, parent_ptr)
Register a rate limiter with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_WAV_WRITER(writer, name, parent_ptr)
Register a WAV writer with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_MEDIA_SOURCE(source, name, parent_ptr)
Register a media source with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_OPEN(pathname, name, flags, ...)
Open a file and register the file descriptor. #define NAMED_UNREGISTER_FD(fd)
Unregister a file descriptor. #define NAMED_REGISTER_FD(fd, name)
Register an existing file descriptor. #define NAMED_REGISTER_ATOMIC(a, name, parent_ptr)
Register an atomic_t with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_ATOMIC_PTR(a, name, parent_ptr)
Register an _Atomic(void *) with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_THREAD(thread, name, parent_ptr)
Register a thread handle with name and automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_UNREGISTER_THREAD(thread)
Unregister a thread handle. #define NAMED_REGISTER_TCP_CLIENT(client, name, parent_ptr)
Register a TCP client with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_WEBSOCKET_CLIENT(client, name, parent_ptr)
Register a WebSocket client with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_APP_CLIENT(client, name, parent_ptr)
Register an app client with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_VIDEO_FRAME_BUFFER(buf, name, parent_ptr)
Register a video frame buffer with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_NODE_POOL(pool, name, parent_ptr)
Register a node pool with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_THREAD_POOL(pool, name, parent_ptr)
Register a thread pool with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_OPTIONS_BUILDER(builder, name, parent_ptr)
Register an options builder with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_SIMPLE_FRAME_SWAP(swap, name, parent_ptr)
Register a simple frame swap with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_CLIENT_AUDIO_PIPELINE(pipeline, name, parent_ptr)
Register a client audio pipeline with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_WEBSOCKET_IMPL(data, name, parent_ptr)
#define NAMED_REGISTER_LWS_CONTEXT(context, name, parent_ptr)
Register a libwebsockets context with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_FFMPEG_CONTEXT(context, name, parent_ptr)
Register an FFmpeg decoder context with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_REGISTER_CONTEXT(context, context_type, name, parent_ptr)
Register a generic context with automatic format specifier. #define NAMED_GET_BY_PTR(key, buffer, size)
Get name of a pointer/key or format as address fallback. #define NAMED_GET_BY_INT(id, buffer, size)
Get name of an integer ID or format as hex fallback. #define NAMED_GET_BY_STR(str, buffer, size)
Copy a string to buffer, with bounds checking.

Type-Specific Description Macros
These macros encapsulate the proper casting and type hint for common types. Use these instead of NAMED_DESCRIBE for better readability and consistency.



#define NAME_DESCRIBE_MUTEX(m)
Describe a mutex_t for logging. #define NAME_DESCRIBE_RWLOCK(l)
Describe an rwlock_t for logging. #define NAME_DESCRIBE_COND(c)
Describe a cond_t for logging. #define NAME_DESCRIBE_THREAD(t)
Describe a thread for logging. #define NAME_DESCRIBE_TRANSPORT(tr)
Describe a transport for logging. #define NAME_DESCRIBE_SOCKET(fd)
Describe a socket for logging. #define NAME_DESCRIBE_RINGBUF(rb)
Describe a ring buffer for logging.

Typedefs


typedef void(* named_iter_callback_t) (uintptr_t key, const char *name, void *user_data)
Callback function for iterating registered entries.

Functions


asciichat_error_t named_init (void)
Initialize the named object registry. void named_destroy (void)
Destroy the named object registry. const char * named_register (uintptr_t key, const char *base_name, const char *type, const char *format_spec, const char *file, int line, const char *func, uintptr_t parent_key)
Register a resource with an auto-suffixed name, type, and location info. const char * named_register_fmt (uintptr_t key, const char *type, const char *format_spec, const char *file, int line, const char *func, const char *fmt,...)
Register a resource with a formatted name, type, and location info (no auto-suffix). void named_unregister (uintptr_t key)
Unregister a resource by key. const char * named_update_name (uintptr_t key, const char *new_base_name)
Update the registered name for a resource with a new base name. const char * named_get (uintptr_t key)
Look up the registered name for a resource. const char * named_get_type (uintptr_t key)
Look up the registered type for a resource. const char * named_get_format_spec (uintptr_t key)
Get the format specifier for a registered named object. const char * named_register_fd (int fd, const char *file, int line, const char *func)
Register a file descriptor with namespace encoding. const char * named_get_fd (int fd)
Look up a registered file descriptor. const char * named_get_fd_format_spec (int fd)
Get the format specifier for a registered file descriptor. const char * named_register_packet_type (int pkt_type, const char *file, int line, const char *func)
Register a packet type with namespace encoding. const char * named_get_packet_type (int pkt_type)
Look up a registered packet type. const char * named_get_packet_type_format_spec (int pkt_type)
Get the format specifier for a registered packet type. const char * named_get_by_type_and_id (const char *type_name, size_t type_len, int id)
Look up an integer ID by type name and value. const char * named_describe (uintptr_t key, const char *type_hint)
Format a description string for logging. uintptr_t asciichat_thread_to_key (asciichat_thread_t thread)
Convert a thread handle to a registry key. const char * named_describe_thread (void *thread)
Describe a thread for logging (function wrapper). void named_registry_register_packet_types (void)
Register all packet types from packet_type_t enum. void named_registry_for_each (named_iter_callback_t callback, void *user_data)
Iterate through all registered entries.

Detailed Description

Named object registry for debugging — log identifiable resource names.

Definition in file debug/named.h.
